title: Fix structural governance audit blockers
description: Resolve structural @go governance blockers: mandatory reviewer evidence validation, evidence artifact production, review schema, status vocabulary alignment, Gate 0 inventory validation, and TaskSpec scope enforcement.
acceptance_criteria: CI or hook path invokes reviewer evidence validation.
A deterministic helper can create and finalize required evidence artifacts.
review.yaml has a JSON schema and runtime validator.
ExecutionReport status vocabulary is consistent across schema and templates.
sadp-audit validates Gate 0 inventory evidence for staged TaskSpecs.
sadp-audit invokes ai_guard.py task with a real TaskSpec when available.
Positive and negative reviewer evidence probes pass.
